overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a shirtless character with green hair walking through a bustling cyberpunk city street. The environment features neon signage, street vendors, diverse NPCs, and transitions from an open plaza to a covered pedestrian commercial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with vending kiosks and benches

events.description: character turns slightly left to navigate around a pedestrian in purple outfit

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza toward covered walkway, passing orange benches and teal vending kiosk

notable_agents.action: woman in purple athletic wear walking past the character

entered.detail: futuristic green-teal kiosk structure with orange signage and glass front
modern public seating with orange cushions and metallic frames
large vertical advertisement display showing a portrait with green background

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a sunlit open plaza with concrete tiles, passing a teal vending kiosk and orange benches on the right. A large billboard is visible on the left as the character walks forward and turns slightly to avoid a pedestrian.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with palm trees and red path

events.description: entering covered walkway with overhead glass structure and palm trees
character steps onto distinctive red painted pedestrian path

agents.ego_description: walking along covered walkway with palm trees, transitioning onto the red pedestrian path

notable_agents.action: child with blonde hair walking ahead on the red path

entered.detail: tall tropical palm plants lining the left side of the walkway
transparent or semi-transparent roof covering the pedestrian area
distinctive red painted strip marking the center of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a semi-covered walkway with palm trees and an overhead glass structure. The character steps onto a distinctive red pedestrian path and walks past various NPCs, with the plaza elements now behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial street with food vendors and neon signage

events.description: entering denser commercial area with bright purple neon food stall on the left
passing construction worker in yellow safety vest near equipment on the left

agents.ego_description: navigating through crowded pedestrian street with various vendors and shoppers

notable_agents.action: construction worker in yellow safety vest and hard hat standing near equipment
woman in athletic wear walking alongside the character

entered.detail: food vendor stall with bright purple neon lighting and signage
tall building with distinctive red exterior walls and vertical lines
various market stalls and vendor carts lining the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The environment becomes a dense commercial street with bright purple neon food stalls and red building facades. The crowd density increases as the character passes a construction worker and navigates through shoppers and vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial corridor with overhead walkways and construction debris

events.description: area becomes more cluttered with cardboard debris and construction materials on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking through narrower section with construction debris and overhead metal structures

notable_agents.action: elderly woman in white dress walking ahead of the character

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian bridge or walkway structure with metal framework crossing above the street
scattered cardboard, bags, and construction materials along the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final section features a narrower enclosed corridor with overhead metal walkways and construction debris scattered on the right. The character continues past an elderly woman and various street vendors as the red building facade looms closer on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open plaza into a dense, neon-lit commercial corridor. It begins in a sunlit area with concrete tiles, passing a teal vending kiosk and orange benches before the character turns to avoid a pedestrian. As the camera moves forward, the open space shifts into a semi-covered walkway where the character steps onto a red pedestrian path beneath a glass structure and palm trees. The scene then expands into a crowded commercial street characterized by bright purple neon food stalls and red building facades, with the crowd density increasing around shoppers and vendors. Finally, the environment narrows into an enclosed corridor with overhead metal walkways and construction debris, moving past street vendors as the red architecture looms closer.
